name: toggle
description: A two-state pressed button (WAI-ARIA toggle button: aria-pressed) with shadcn variants/sizes and an optional Lucide icon.
docs: Register <lv-toggle> by importing components/ui/toggle.ts from your entry point. Bind `pressed` for controlled state and listen for `lv-change` (detail = { pressed, value }). `variant` (default|outline), `size` (sm|default|lg), optional `icon` (Lucide name); set `aria-label` for icon-only toggles.
